description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Emergency preparedness is a critical priority.

, in consultation with the Protocol Security Workstream Lead, must regularly evaluate the emergency preparedness of the Emergency Response Group. This can be done through running fire drills or through extensive postmortems after an actual incident.
summary: Update Emergency Response Article To Agent Framework
description: Updates the Emergency Response Article to reflect the Agent Framework, assigning emergency response authority to the Core Facilitator and Core GovOps.
